metadata.name: Plan a Crop Dusting Mission for a Drone

description: A farmer needs to apply a fungicide to a specific, hard-to-reach part of a field using a large spraying drone.

nodes.task_description: Allow the user to draw a polygon on the field map to define the target application area.
Get the application rate for the specified fungicide.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the correct rate from the product label.

nodes.task_description: Generate an optimized flight plan for the spraying drone to cover the target polygon, considering spray drift and buffer zones.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates an efficient and safe mission plan.
